productDisplayName: Puma Men Red Polo Neck T-shirt
description: Style NoteThe German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. With its fine finishing and detailing this Polo neck T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout.Product DetailsRed polo neck T-shirt, spread collar with check fabric in underlay , short buttoned placket , short sleeves with flatlock, brand badge embroidered on left front chest, brand patch on left hem, branding at back neck, vented hem with flatlockMaterials and Care100% cottonWash and iron inside outMachine wash warm Warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
